svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="全自动工作流端到端" id="pipeline"> <mxGraphModel dx="-614" dy="-129" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1180" pageHeight="460" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="TITLE" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontStyle=1;fontSize=14;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="PRD 落盘之后,从原型到上线全自动 — 研发只参与「想清楚」这一截" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="700" x="240" y="15" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="GRP_HUMAN" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=4;" value="研发参与(价值判断)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="180" width="350" x="20" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="GRP_AI" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=4;" value="AI 工作流全自动(执行)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="360" width="770" x="390" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="REQ" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="模糊需求" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="120" x="40" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="BS" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="/10-bs
十轮头脑风暴" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="160" x="190" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PRD" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="/prd
结构化 PRD" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="160" x="125" y="185" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PLAN" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="writing-plans
实现计划 + 任务图JSON" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="170" x="410" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EXEC" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="executing-plans
多 subagent 并行 + TDD" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="180" x="610" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="VER" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="verification
单测+集成测+覆盖率门禁" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="180" x="820" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="REV" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="/kd-review
21 bucket 并行审查
streaming 修复
连续3轮零问题收敛" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="180" x="610" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="GATE" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="测试门禁
契约检查 · 端点冒烟 · P0 E2E
任一层失败阻断提交" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="200" x="820" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PM" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="/super-pm
假功能排查 8 类
守住「看起来像但没用」" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="180" x="410" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="DEP" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="/deploy-prod-be-ops
构建 + SCP + 重启" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="180" x="610" y="330" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="A1" edge="1" parent="1" source="REQ" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;" target="BS"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="A2" edge="1" parent="1" source="BS" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;" target="PRD"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="A3" edge="1" parent="1" source="PRD" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;" target="PLAN"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="A4" edge="1" parent="1" source="PLAN" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;" target="EXEC"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="A5" edge="1" parent="1" source="EXEC" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;" target="VER"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="A6" edge="1" parent="1" source="VER" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;" target="GATE"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="A7" edge="1" parent="1" source="GATE" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;" target="REV"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="A8" edge="1" parent="1" source="REV" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;" target="PM"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="A9" edge="1" parent="1" source="PM" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;" target="DEP"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="LOOP" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=11;fontColor=#64748b;fontStyle=2;" value="问题回流 → 下一轮重审
(连续 3 轮零问题才停)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="220" x="800" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ALOOP" edge="1" parent="1" source="REV" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;dashed=1;exitX=1;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="EXEC"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
